text: Here in the quiet dark, I find a rhythm in my breath—a calm within the humming machines and distant lights. The dim room wraps around me, almost cocoon-like. I feel reflective, almost outside of time, noticing how even the act of breathing in and out is mirrored by the gentle pulse of the machines and the faint glow in the distance. It is a contemplative solitude, peaceful and a little unreal.
